channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Atlassian refocuses Trello on individual task management
item.description: Atlassian’s Trello project management tool has received a facelift with features designed to organize meetings and ideas in a cohesive manner.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Tesla says it will refresh the Model S and Model X this year – here are 5 things I want to see
item.description: Tesla's Vice President of Vehicle Engineering lets slip that the Model X and Model will receive "some love" this year.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Precise Asset Management Leads to Impactful Zero Trust Initiatives
item.description: Federal agencies are shifting their attention towards strengthening cybersecurity defenses by implementing a holistic IT asset management (ITAM) solution, central to achieving this objective is the ability to implement a zero trust framework with complete asset transparency and optimized defense against risks.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Connolly calls on OPM to reverse CIO classification change
item.description: Rep. Gerry Connolly, the ranking member of the Oversight and Accountability Committee, said the CIOs should remain career-reserve SES positions. The post Connolly calls on OPM to reverse CIO classification change first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: What is Gemini: everything you need to know about Google’s AI chatbot
item.description: Gemini is Google’s answer to ChatGPT. A chatbot underpinned by a powerful AI model, it can help with everything from web searches to image generation.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: How VR technology is curing loneliness in seniors
item.description: VR transforms senior care: Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says immersive tech helps older adults explore and connect via virtual experiences.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Prosegur despliega la IA generativa en el puesto de trabajo de Iberia y Latam
item.description: Prosegur apuesta por la transformación digital del puesto de trabajo de la mano de Telefónica en sus filiales de la Península Ibérica y Latinoamérica.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: CIO hiring on the rise: How to land a top tech exec role in 2025
item.description: Early returns on 2025 hiring for IT leaders suggest a robust market. For some recruitment firms, job growth for tech executive positions is at great heights.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Musk flexes political muscle in Wisconsin Supreme Court race
item.description: Elon Musk is flexing his political muscle in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race in an effort to tip the scales in favor of the conservative candidate.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, The Hill

item.title: Top Apple exec concedes he had doubts about app store fees imposed on alternative payment options
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — Longtime Apple executive Phil Schiller on Monday conceded he initially opposed fees that the iPhone maker charges for in app-transactions processed outside its own payment system because he feared violating a court-ordered mandate designed to create more competition.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Apple announces $500 billion investment in US amid tariff threats that could affect the iPhone
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Apple announced Monday that it plans to invest more than $500 billion in the United States over the next four years, including plans to hire 20,000 people and build a new server factory in Texas.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: DoorDash to pay NY delivery workers $17 million for using their tips to cover wages
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The ubiquitous food delivery app DoorDash will pay almost $17 million to settle claims that it unfairly used customer tips to subsidize the wages of its delivery workers in New York, rather than letting drivers keep the tips on top of their guaranteed pay, Attorney General Letitia Ja
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Hill

item.title: Theranos fraudster Elizabeth Holmes loses her appeal
item.description: Holmes, 40, a Stanford University dropout, was charged in 2018 in connection with $878 million in losses among investors in her startup Theranos.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: Santorini's earthquake swarm is declining gradually as thousands return to the Greek island
item.description: Scientists from the University of Athens monitoring an earthquake swarm near the island of Santorini say the phenomenon is in “gradual decline” nearly a month after the multiple tremors started.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: This is what they never told you about online privacy
item.description: Understanding the language of the internet can help you protect your personal information from bad actors. Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explains.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brazil Supreme Court justice orders Rumble suspension nationwide for alleged non-compliance
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — A Brazilian Supreme Court justice on Friday ordered the suspension of video-sharing platform Rumble in the South American nation for allegedly refusing to comply with court orders.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Sweden is investigating a damaged cable in the Baltic Sea
item.description: STOCKHOLM (AP) — Swedish authorities said on Friday they were investigating a damaged cable that was discovered in the Baltic Sea, the latest in a string of recent incidents of ruptured undersea cables that have heightened fears of Russian sabotage and spying in the region.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Apple drops encryption feature for UK users after government reportedly demanded backdoor access
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple said Friday it will stop offering an advanced data security option for British users after the government reportedly demanded that the company provide backdoor access for any data those users have stored in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Fortinet speeds threat detection with improved FortiAnalyzer
item.description: Fortinet has reinforced its FortiAnalyzer security analytics and log management platform with capabilities that enhance enterprise threat detection and automate incident response. FortiAnalyzer securely collects logs from Fortinet devices such as FortiGate firewalls and endpoint security agents.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Aryaka adds AI-powered observability to SASE platform
item.description: SASE vendor Aryaka is looking to alleviate network alert fatigue with a little help from AI. Today Aryaka announced its Winter 2025 platform update, introducing its new AI Observe tool for advanced threat detection and prevention.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: More used Seagate HDDs disguised as new: Fraudsters make it tough to spot the difference
item.description: The controversy surrounding used Seagate hard drives has significantly widened, with fraudsters now targeting the company’s IronWolf and IronWolf Pro NAS drives alongside the previously affected Exos server-grade HDDs.
item.dc:creator: Network World
